_comment: Judge registry for the verify-device vision panel. Each judge is {id, model,
provider, enabled, weight?}. `model` is the OpenRouter id; OpenRouter fronts
openai/anthropic/google so one HTTP path serves every judge today. `provider`
defaults to 'openrouter' and is the seam for a future direct-provider adapter
(a one-file add in panel.mjs' callModel switch). Named ensembles below select a
roster by judge id; `--ensemble <name>` picks one, `--models a,b,c` overrides.
A keyless / credit-depleted / absent judge is skipped-and-recorded at runtime
